State-discovery (A.0-style empirical probes) done pre-PDR: yell asset valid (ffprobe 2.68s ogg), sprite 512px CHAR_SCALE 0.55 measured, placeFromFree.ts confirmed to have NO pooped gate (the S84 gate lives only in applyPickupSpark — wrong verb, again).

priorities.label: S85 P1 — rainbow flyover yell SILENT in live playtest: diagnose runtime cause (suspected suspended AudioContext — yell fires from rAF, not the click gesture) and fix
priorities.objective: Clicking the rainbow must produce the audible Gnyaaaah yell on both peers. Confirm root cause at runtime before committing the fix.
priorities.testing: unit: latch/freshness preserved; runtime: preview click → audible + console probe of audio chain state
priorities.check_method: S85 P1 (646e724): DIAGNOSED BEFORE FIXING — preview runtime probes proved the wiring correct (flyover active, /audio/rainbow-yell.ogg fetched 200, prototype-patched AudioBufferSourceNode.start fired with ctxState=running, 2.67s buffer) so the S84 claim of a working yell was narrowed to the ASSET: ffmpeg volumedetect mean -52.8 dB, silencedetect = the ENTIRE 2.67s under -45dB (a 2.5ms click then nothing). Source WAV healthy (-16.1 dB mean). Root cause: S84 ad-hoc ffmpeg chain (one-pass loudnorm on a <3s clip suspected) was never committed so it could not be audited. Fix: scripts/make-rainbow-yell.py — committed pipeline (asetrate 1.30 + vibrato + alimiter, NO loudnorm) with built-in audibility gate (mean>=-30dB, peak>=-6dB else delete output + exit 1); regenerated ogg = mean -15.2 dB peak -0.0 (in family with lightning-crackle -13.2 reference); added duckMusic(2700ms) on yell fire (the established one-shot duck pattern — the second audibility defect: nothing lowered the bed under a 2.7s voice line). VERIFIED: in-browser fetch+decodeAudioData of the SERVED asset = RMS -15.2 dB; vitest audioManager 63/63; full suite 1281/1281; tsc clean.

priorities.label: S85 P2 — flyover character ~10x larger (user: ~20% of the whole screen as it flies past)
priorities.objective: CHAR_SCALE 0.55 → 1.75 (≈10x area), OFFSCREEN_MARGIN 220 → 360 so it still enters/exits fully offscreen.
priorities.testing: flyoverPose unit tests still pass (offscreen-both-ends with new margin); preview screenshot at apex
priorities.check_method: S85 P2 (e201acd): CHAR_SCALE 0.55->1.75 (~10x area; visible content 345x208 alpha-bbox renders ~604x364 px = ~31 pct canvas width at apex, the user 20-pct-of-screen ask), OFFSCREEN_MARGIN 220->380 re-derived from visible-content max corner reach (202px source x 1.75 x 1.05 wobble = 372) so no pop-in at traverse ends; fallback Graphics normalizes against new FALLBACK_NATIVE_SCALE 0.55 so the vector stand-in grows in lockstep with the sprite bump. Apex fit verified analytically (top edge y=39 at apex, bottom 878 at entry, both in-canvas). VERIFIED LIVE: setInterval apex-hold pin (switchTick=tick-120) + screenshot shows the full-size character over the trippy backdrop; flyoverPose tests 8/8 (pose math untouched); full vitest 1281/1281; bundle 549.0KiB<550.

priorities.label: S85 P3 — pooped-cruiser gate on PLACE_FROM_FREE: while debuffed, the lagging avatar must ARRIVE at the placement point before a build commits (S84 gated only PICKUP_SPARK — the claim verb, not the build verb)
priorities.objective: applyPlaceFromFree: if isCruiserDebuffed(player, world.tick) and avatarPos is farther than POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS from placementPos → silent reject + rejectReasons.pickupPoopedTooFar++. Pure fn of synced fields (optimistic/authoritative agree).
priorities.testing: reject-far / allow-near / allow-after-expiry / allow-not-pooped / counter increment; full vitest + tsc
priorities.check_method: S85 P3 (d4a7d8b): root cause = S84 gated the WRONG VERB (applyPickupSpark, the LMB-down claim) while every real build runs the atomic LMB-up PLACE_FROM_FREE which had NO pooped gate — the S84 reflexion lesson (the bug lives where the check is MISSING) applied to its own fix. Gate added in applyPlaceFromFree between remote-reach (step 4) and spawner-zone (step 5): isCruiserDebuffed && distSq(placementPos, avatarPos) > POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS(36)^2 -> raceRejects++ + rejectReasons.pickupPoopedTooFar++ + silent return BEFORE fsmPickup (S52 atomicity contract holds: spark Free, player Idle). Pure fn of synced fields = optimistic/authoritative agreement (S84 parity). Import edge placeFromFree->gameMode safe (gameMode imports world TYPE-only, S84-validated edge). GATES: 5-case test matrix (reject-far/arrive-commit/exact-boundary-36/expired-debuff/un-pooped-far) 21/21 in placeFromFree.test.ts; full vitest 1281/1281; tsc clean; gating e2e 34/1skip; LIVE-VERIFIED through the real controls dispatchFn: far+pooped -> 0 prims + counter 1 + spark Free; arrived -> 1 prim.

priorities.label: S85 P4 — top BACKLOG batch (user plan): host-migration design session · EYES follow-ups · lobby D1 + e2e geometry getters (Claude discretion to trim to most important)
priorities.objective: EXECUTED as 3 sub-parts: P4a host-migration design doc (c1498e8, HOST_MIGRATION_DESIGN.md — succession warrant + mirror-adoption takeover, 4-phase landing plan); P4b EYES follow-ups (1f9154e — per-owner bond patterns, hazard identity rings, MEMORY_FOG_COLOR 0x161b2e restore); P4c lobby D1 seat join/leave animations (seatAnimPose pure + Ticker.shared cosmetic pass, silent baseline) + e2e geometry-getter migration (titleScreen.getButtonCenters + lobbyScreen.getUiPoints consumed via helpers.titleButtonCss/lobbyUiPoints across helpers + 5 specs — the S50 P5 hardcoded-coord drift class closed).

priorities.check_method: S85 P4 (c1498e8 + 1f9154e + 778e001): THREE SUB-PARTS, all named in the user batch. P4a HOST_MIGRATION_DESIGN.md — design-only, grounded by empirical probes (save.ts:564 netSnapshot strip-list = full WorldSnapshot minus 5 reconstructible fields; session.ts trust chain; main.ts reconnect constants); two-problem split (authority=mirror-adoption cold standby, identity=succession warrant under the room-code key commitment + epoch zombie defense); 4-phase landing plan, protocol v7->8 deferred to D4. P4b EYES — bond ownership patterns (seat-keyed white overlays, networked-only, shuffle-safe via per-frame color->seat rebuild), hazard identity rings (dashed white pulse INSIDE existing Graphics = fog.spec children contract untouched, CARRIED-potato + DESPAWNING-hunter excluded), MEMORY_FOG_COLOR 0x161b2e restore; pure helpers tested (+9); fog.spec 6/6 post-change; live screenshots verified all three (dim trail, rungs on cyan bond vs solid P0, ringed potato). P4c — D1 seat pop-in/blink-out (seatAnimPose pure +4 tests, silent baseline, center pivot) + e2e geometry getters (LIVE-container reads, DEV-gated like __SPARK__; helpers.titleButtonCss/lobbyUiPoints; 5 specs + helpers migrated; join-pane tap re-derived from rects byte-identically 1100/430). BUNDLE CHARTER caught RED at 551.8KiB>550 (EYES had silently crossed at 550.4 — only fog.spec+vitest were run at that commit, no build); remediation = debugOverlay code-split (5.22kB lazy chunk, ?debug=1-only, null-guard makes async arrival benign) -> index 546.5KiB<550 (more headroom than S84). PROCESS DEFECT CAUGHT+OWNED: first P4c gate run reported exit 0 with 8 e2e FAILURES (titleButtonCss unimported) — tail-pipe swallowed the exit code AND the import-patcher self-defeated (body replacement inserted the name before the import check ran); re-ran unpiped with explicit exit capture: fixed, then 34/1skip twice consecutively. FINAL GATES: tsc clean; vitest 1293/1293; gating e2e 34/1skip x2 (exit 0 captured explicitly); bundle 546.5<550; Rule-22 audit sweep clean (no placeholders, all referenced files exist, dynamic-import path resolves); CI on 778e001 polling.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #verify-the-asset-not-just-the-pipeline #uncommitted-generation-chains-are-unauditable: S84 shipped a SILENT rainbow yell (entire 2.67s under -45dB) because the ffmpeg mastering chain ran as ad-hoc shell commands — CHECK verified duration+size+wiring but nobody MEASURED the content, and with the chain uncommitted the failure could not even be diagnosed from git. The diagnosis discipline that worked: instrument the runtime FIRST (prototype-patch AudioBufferSourceNode.start + network watch proved the pipeline healthy in 3 probes), THEN measure the asset (volumedetect mean -52.8 vs the -13.2 audible reference = the smoking gun in one command). Fix encoded the lesson: scripts/make-rainbow-yell.py carries a BUILT-IN audibility gate (fail-loud floor on mean/peak, output deleted on miss) so a silent render can never ship again. LESSON: for generated assets, commit the generation pipeline WITH a content-level acceptance gate — duration/size/format checks are shape, not content.

P3 #the-same-bug-class-recurs-on-the-adjacent-verb: S84 P1 fixed pooped-grab on applyPickupSpark and its OWN reflexion said the bug lives where the check is MISSING — yet the fix only covered the LMB-down claim verb while the atomic LMB-up PLACE_FROM_FREE (the verb every real build runs through) stayed ungated, so the debuff provably never bit the build loop. One file-read settled it (placeFromFree.ts has a numbered validation ladder; pooped appeared nowhere). LESSON: after gating a verb, enumerate the SIBLING verbs that consume the same resource (claim/build/drop for sparks) and assert the gate on each or document why not — a validation-ladder reducer makes the audit a 30-second grep.

P4a #separate-authority-from-identity-in-handover-designs: host-migration looked intractable for 3 sessions because authority handover (who simulates, from what state) and identity handover (why survivors should TRUST the successor under a room code that commits to the dead host pubkey) were conflated. Probing save.ts:564 dissolved half the problem empirically — netSnapshot is the FULL WorldSnapshot minus exactly 5 reconstructible fields, so every client already holds 95 percent of takeover state and cold-standby adoption needs no new wire traffic. The identity half then has exactly one S82-trust-model-preserving shape: a succession warrant signed by the original host key at Begin + epoch counter for zombie demotion. LESSON: in P2P trust designs, write down WHAT the existing cryptographic commitment binds (room code = host pubkey) before designing — the constraint dictates the solution space.

P4b/c #live-getters-kill-coordinate-drift #cosmetic-anim-needs-a-silent-baseline: the e2e suite hardcoded title/lobby click coords with comments duplicating renderer math — the exact class behind the S50 P5 wrong-button regression — replaced with geometry getters that read the LIVE Pixi containers (drift now impossible by construction, and the layout comments became code). D1 seat animations needed a first-update SILENT baseline so entering an already-populated room does not fire a pop-in storm — transition animations key on OBSERVED state CHANGES, never on initial projection. EYES: when a cue must survive CVD, spend the luminance+shape+motion channels (white rungs/beads/chevrons on bonds, dashed pulsing hazard ring), and exclude entities whose identity is already unambiguous (rainbow goodie, cinematic Voltkin) so the cue keeps MEANING hostile.
session_status: S85 CLOSE-PENDING-HANDOFF: P1-P4 complete, 6 commits pushed, all local gates green, CI on 778e001 in progress

analyze_retrospective.mode: compact inline (GREEN 39.4% — Micro batch, user-waived deliberation; ZERO self-retrospective)
analyze_retrospective.method_effectiveness: Diagnose-before-fix was the session backbone and paid for itself twice: (P1) three runtime probes through the preview harness (prototype-patched source.start, network watch, in-browser decode) cleared the ENTIRE wiring stack in minutes and narrowed a vague playtest report (rainbow makes no sound) to a one-command asset measurement — the fix then encoded its own regression gate into the committed script. (P3) one read of placeFromFree.ts validation ladder beat any amount of reasoning about WHY the S84 gate did not bite. The preview-harness dev-pin loop (setInterval apex-hold) turned a 4s transient into a stable screenshot subject.
analyze_retrospective.process_failures_owned: (1) Gate-piping: vitest/e2e piped through tail returned the PIPE exit code — a background gate reported exit 0 over 8 real e2e failures; only the suspicious 26-vs-34 pass-count triggered the unpiped re-run. Rule: never pipe a gate; capture exit codes explicitly. (2) The python import-patcher checked for the symbol AFTER body-replacement had inserted it — self-defeating guard; the e2e lane caught it, tsc could not (e2e is tsc-blind). (3) Bundle charter was not re-measured at the EYES commit boundary (only fog.spec+vitest ran) — it had silently crossed 550.4KiB and was caught only at the P4c full-gate; per-commit charter checks must include the build when render code changes.
analyze_retrospective.wins: All 3 playtest bugs fixed + live-verified same-session (CI green + deployed before P4 even started); /usr/bin/bash generative spend (re-mastered the existing committed source WAV); host-migration unblocked after 3 sessions of carry by an empirical probe that dissolved half the problem (netSnapshot strip-list); bundle remediation IMPROVED on the pre-session baseline (546.5 vs 548.8 KiB) while ADDING three features; every S82 EYES carry-forward closed; the S50 P5 coordinate-drift class structurally dead.
analyze_retrospective.session_cost: Generative: $0.00 this session ($3.05 prior of $10 cap). Council API: $0 (Micro, user-waived). 6 commits, 4 priorities (P4 = 3 sub-parts), 2 full gating e2e lanes green + 1 caught-red, CI green on P1-P3 lineage + 778e001 polling.
